title: TB Discharge Summary
subtitle: Pulmonary TB — Inpatient Discharge

physicianDiagnoses.text: TB Paru Kasus Baru, BTA (+/+/+), klinis sedang

aiDiagnoses.text: Tuberculosis of lung, confirmed by sputum microscopy
aiDiagnoses.evidence: BTA sputum SPS +++/+++/++; GeneXpert MTB detected, Rifampicin sensitive; chest X-ray infiltrate patchy right upper lobe with fibrocavitation.
GDP 168 mg/dL, HbA1c 8.2% on admission labs; Metformin 500 mg initiated during stay.
Hb 10.2 g/dL on admission; Sulfas Ferrosus 300 mg prescribed at discharge.

procedures.evidence: BTA sputum SPS performed ×3 during diagnostic workup (Section V, discharge summary).
Foto thorax PA: infiltrate patchy right upper lobe, fibrocavitation (+).
Edukasi TB-DOTS and PMO assignment to spouse documented in discharge plan (Section X).

inaCbgNote: A15.0 selected (sputum-confirmed) vs A15.1 (culture-confirmed) vs A15.2 (histologically-confirmed).
